MERGE (malware_ChromeLoader:Malware {name:'ChromeLoader'})
ON CREATE SET
  malware_ChromeLoader.family = 'ChromeLoader',
  malware_ChromeLoader.summary = 'Browser-hijacking malware that ultimately manifests as a Chrome browser extension, modifies Chrome settings, and redirects traffic to advertisement websites. Uses PowerShell and is noted as potentially leading to more advanced activity (e.g., ransomware/spyware propagation or theft of browser-session data). Reported to have resurged in activity recently.'
ON MATCH SET
  malware_ChromeLoader.family = CASE WHEN malware_ChromeLoader.family IS NULL OR malware_ChromeLoader.family = '' THEN 'ChromeLoader' ELSE malware_ChromeLoader.family END,
  malware_ChromeLoader.summary = CASE WHEN malware_ChromeLoader.summary IS NULL OR malware_ChromeLoader.summary = '' THEN 'Browser-hijacking malware that ultimately manifests as a Chrome browser extension, modifies Chrome settings, and redirects traffic to advertisement websites. Uses PowerShell and is noted as potentially leading to more advanced activity (e.g., ransomware/spyware propagation or theft of browser-session data). Reported to have resurged in activity recently.' ELSE malware_ChromeLoader.summary END

ON CREATE SET

  inc_ChromeLoader_Generic.summary = CASE WHEN inc_ChromeLoader_Generic.summary IS NULL OR inc_ChromeLoader_Generic.summary = '' THEN 'Windows infections attributed to ChromeLoader delivered via ISO files masquerading as cracked video games or pirated films/TV programs; results in persistent browser-hijacker behavior and Chrome extension installation with settings modification and ad-redirects.' ELSE inc_ChromeLoader_Generic.summary END

, rel_involved_malware_1.source_id = 'malwarebytes-labs-blog-chromeloader'

MERGE (ta_clop:ThreatActor {name:'Clop'})
ON CREATE SET
  ta_clop.sponsor = 'cyber-crime group',
  ta_clop.motivation = 'financial',
  ta_clop.summary = 'Extortion and ransomware operation run by a cyber-crime group; historically used its own ransomware payload for encryption and more recently has relied on data theft/leak threats for extortion. Linked to exploiting zero-day vulnerabilities including Accellion FTA in 2021 and CVE-2023-0669 in GoAnywhere MFT in 2023.'
ON MATCH SET
  ta_clop.sponsor = CASE WHEN ta_clop.sponsor IS NULL OR ta_clop.sponsor = '' THEN 'cyber-crime group' ELSE ta_clop.sponsor END,
  ta_clop.motivation = CASE WHEN ta_clop.motivation IS NULL OR ta_clop.motivation = '' THEN 'financial' ELSE ta_clop.motivation END,
  ta_clop.summary = CASE WHEN ta_clop.summary IS NULL OR ta_clop.summary = '' THEN 'Extortion and ransomware operation run by a cyber-crime group; historically used its own ransomware payload for encryption and more recently has relied on data theft/leak threats for extortion. Linked to exploiting zero-day vulnerabilities including Accellion FTA in 2021 and CVE-2023-0669 in GoAnywhere MFT in 2023.' ELSE ta_clop.summary END
MERGE (mot_fin:Motivation {type:'financial'})
MERGE (ta_clop)-[:motivated_by]->(mot_fin)

ON MATCH SET

MERGE (ta_clop)-[:has_alias]->(ta_snakefly)
MERGE (ta_clop)-[:has_alias]->(ta_ta505)
MERGE (ta_clop)-[:has_alias]->(ta_fin11)

ON CREATE SET

MERGE (inc_2021_accellion)-[:involved_tool {evidence:'Exploitation of multiple vulnerabilities in Accellion FTA.'}]->(tool_accellion)

MERGE (inc_2023_goanywhere)-[:involved_tool {evidence:'GoAnywhere MFT platform targeted via CVE-2023-0669 (zero-day).'}]->(tool_goanywhere)
MERGE (inc_2023_goanywhere)-[:exploited_in {evidence:'Responsible for exploiting zero-day CVE-2023-0669 in GoAnywhere MFT.'}]->(cve_2023_0669)
